Title: Graphic Print Tee - Yellow Hair Portrait Sweatshirt
Description:
Showcase your unique style with this vibrant graphic print long-sleeve t-shirt. Featuring a colorful portrait of a woman with yellow hair, this design adds a striking piece of wearable art to your wardrobe.

Crafted for comfort and style, this shirt is perfect for casual outings, festival wear, or simply making a statement on a cool day. The soft, breathable fabric ensures all-day comfort, making it an ideal piece for everyday use.

Product Details

  • Design: Eye-catching artistic portrait with pop-art inspiration.
  • Material: Soft, high-quality cotton blend (or specified material).
  • Fit: Relaxed fit, suitable for all body types.
  • Care: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle.

This makes a fantastic gift for art lovers, fashion enthusiasts, or anyone who appreciates bold, colorful designs. Pair it with jeans or leggings for a modern, effortless look.
